heroHeadline: Striking Bushehr NPP Would Contaminate Gulf Water Supplies; Nepal Imposes Two-Day Weekends as Hormuz Fuel Crisis Deepens
heroSubtitle: Experts warn a strike on Iran's only operating nuclear reactor would devastate desalination infrastructure serving millions; South Asian nations begin emergency energy rationing as the Hormuz blockade enters its second month.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
